reviews.comment:
Muy sucio SIN AGUA en los sanitarios
Pagar la cuota del ACA para esta porquería
La salvan los empleados

(Translated by Google)
Very dirty. NO WATER in the restrooms. Paying the ACA fee for this garbage is a waste. The employees are the only ones who save it.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Los precios están perfectamente a la vista. Lo único negativo es que cobran para inflar los neumáticos, pero entiendo que es por los robos de los picos de la manguera del compresor.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Prices are clearly displayed. The only downside is that they charge extra for inflating tires, but I understand that's due to thefts of the compressor hose nozzles.

reviewReply.comment:

Saludos

reviews.comment:
Coqueta estacion de servicio, es chica y la atención fue correcta.  No es full, lo que ofrece el mercadito para comer es poco.
Es ypf A.C.A. La ubicación en una esquina de avenida de barrio la hace difícil para acceder si vienes de la mano contraria.

(Translated by Google)
A charming gas station, it's small, and the service was decent. It's not crowded; the food at the market is limited.
It's YPF ACA. Its location on a corner of a neighborhood avenue makes it difficult to access if you're coming from the wrong side.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16461763455653012667/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNncXR6VVd3EAE
